tailored.summary: I am a Senior Software Engineer with a passion for building robust data pipelines and integrating machine learning models into production systems. I bring expertise in Python, MLOps, and model deployment, with a proven track record in feature engineering and data pipeline development. My experience includes leveraging tools like Airflow and scikit-learn to drive impactful results and optimize user experiences through A/B testing.

bullets: Integrated scikit-learn models into production REST APIs, enabling efficient model deployment.
Built Airflow data pipelines processing 1M records/day, ensuring reliable data flow for machine learning applications.
Ran A/B tests to measure feature impact across 200k users, informing data-driven product decisions.
